name: thisismyurl-image-support
description: Build pipeline for the Image Support plugin's editor bundle. Produces assets/build/photo-credit-panel.js (the block-editor sidebar panel for core/image) from assets/editor/photo-credit-panel.jsx via @wordpress/scripts. The plugin's PHP runtime has no Node dependency; this build step exists only to compile the JSX into a browser-loadable bundle plus its asset.php manifest. Version is fixed at 0.0.0 because npm requires semver; plugin versioning lives in thisismyurl-image-support.php (TIMU_IMAGE_SUPPORT_VERSION) and follows the x.Yddd convention.
